login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Choose your preferred login method.
login.magicLinkSentBody: Click the link in your email to log in.
login.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
login.errorEmailNotConfirmed:
Your email has not been verified.
Please check your inbox.
login.errorGeneric: Login failed. Please try again later.
login.errorGoogleFailed: Google login failed. Please try again later.
login.errorMagicLinkFailed: Failed to send login link. Please try again later.
login.errorRateLimit: Too many attempts. Please wait and try again.
login.bannerConfirmError: Email verification failed. Please try again.
login.bannerReset: Password has been reset. Please log in.

signup.title: Sign up
signup.subtitle: Choose your preferred signup method.
signup.magicLinkSentBody: Click the link in your email to complete registration.
signup.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
signup.errorGoogleFailed: Google signup failed. Please try again later.
signup.errorGeneric: Registration failed. Please try again later.
signup.errorAlreadyRegistered: This email is already registered. Please log in instead.
signup.errorSignupDisabled: This signup method is currently unavailable.
signup.errorInvalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
signup.errorRateLimit:
Too many email requests.
Please wait and try again.
signup.planTrialNote: Start with a free 7-day trial. Billing begins after the trial ends.
signup.noPlanNote: You can choose a plan after signing up.

onboarding.title: Welcome to NativeFlow
onboarding.intro: Tell us a little about yourself so we can create a personalized learning plan.

labels.speakByDeadline: When do you want to be conversational?

hints.uiLanguage: You can change this later in settings
hints.currentLevel: Choose the closest match to your current ability.
hints.speakByDeadline: We'll calculate your daily study plan from this target.
hints.targetOutcome: One line is fine. e.g. daily conversation, work emails

placeholders.targetOutcome: e.g. Hold everyday conversations, write work emails

errors.validationRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
errors.loginRequired: Please log in. Sign-in is required to save your profile.

errors.subscriptionRequired: A subscription is required to continue lessons
errors.failedStartLesson: Failed to start the lesson. Please check the data structure.
errors.missingLessonData: Cannot start: lesson data is missing.
errors.missingUserId: Cannot start: user ID is missing.
errors.startInProgress: Cannot start: a previous start is still in progress.

phases.listenRepeatBody: You practiced listening and repeating what you heard.
phases.nextPractice: Next, let's practice answering AI questions in English.

onboarding.headline: Just listen and repeat
onboarding.okNotUnderstand: It's OK not to understand at first
